AI_AGENTS.TITLE: AI Agents
AI_AGENTS.DESCRIPTION: Create and manage AI agents for automated conversations

EMPTY.TITLE: No AI agents yet
EMPTY.DESCRIPTION: Create your first AI agent to automate conversations with RAG, tool-calling, or voice capabilities.

DELETE.TITLE: Delete AI Agent
DELETE.DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete this agent?
DELETE.CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete this agent? This action cannot be undone.

SYSTEM_PROMPT.LABEL: System Prompt
SYSTEM_PROMPT.PLACEHOLDER: You are a helpful customer support agent...

FORM.SETUP_DESCRIPTION: Configure the basic settings and behavior for your AI agent.
FORM.ADVANCED_DESCRIPTION: Edit the raw system prompt directly for full control.

INITIAL_MESSAGE.LABEL: Initial Message
INITIAL_MESSAGE.DESCRIPTION: The greeting message sent to the customer when the conversation starts.
INITIAL_MESSAGE.PLACEHOLDER: Hello! Welcome to our support. How can I help you today?
INITIAL_MESSAGE.TOOLTIP: This message is automatically sent when a new conversation begins. Use {{contact_name}} for personalization.

INSTRUCTIONS.LABEL: Instructions
INSTRUCTIONS.DESCRIPTION: Define the assistant's behavior, personality, and what it should do.
INSTRUCTIONS.PLACEHOLDER: You are a friendly customer support agent for our company. Help customers with orders, returns, and general inquiries. Always be polite and concise.
INSTRUCTIONS.TOOLTIP: These instructions define the assistant's role and behavioral guidelines.

GENERAL_CONTEXT.LABEL: General Context
GENERAL_CONTEXT.DESCRIPTION: Static knowledge about your business that the assistant should know.
GENERAL_CONTEXT.PLACEHOLDER:
Company: AcmeCorp
Products: Widget A ($29.99), Widget B ($49.99)
Hours: Mon–Fri 9am–6pm
Return policy: 30 days, receipt required
GENERAL_CONTEXT.TOOLTIP: Add business information, product catalogs, FAQs — anything the assistant needs as context. For documents, use the Knowledge tab.
GENERAL_CONTEXT.UPLOAD_HINT: For uploading documents (PDF, CSV), go to the Knowledge tab.

SUCCESS_CRITERIA.LABEL: Success Criteria
SUCCESS_CRITERIA.DESCRIPTION: Define when a conversation is considered successfully completed.
SUCCESS_CRITERIA.PLACEHOLDER:
The conversation is successful when:
- The customer's question has been answered
- An order has been placed with all required details
- The customer confirms they have no further questions
SUCCESS_CRITERIA.TOOLTIP: Help the AI understand when to wrap up the conversation.

INTERRUPTION_RULES.LABEL: Escalation Rules
INTERRUPTION_RULES.DESCRIPTION: Define when the assistant should hand off to a human agent.
INTERRUPTION_RULES.PLACEHOLDER:
Escalate to a human agent when:
- The customer asks to speak with a human
- The issue involves billing disputes or refunds over $100
- The customer is frustrated or the AI cannot resolve the issue
INTERRUPTION_RULES.TOOLTIP: These rules trigger a handoff to a human agent.

INACTIVITY.LABEL: Inactivity Handling
INACTIVITY.DESCRIPTION: Configure what happens when the customer stops responding.
INACTIVITY.MESSAGE_PLACEHOLDER: It looks like you've been away. If you still need help, just send a message!
INACTIVITY.TOOLTIP: The assistant will send this message after the timeout period of inactivity.

ERROR_MESSAGE.LABEL: Error Message
ERROR_MESSAGE.DESCRIPTION: Fallback message sent when a technical error occurs.
ERROR_MESSAGE.PLACEHOLDER: I'm sorry, I encountered a technical issue. Please try again or contact support.
ERROR_MESSAGE.TOOLTIP: This message is sent automatically when the AI encounters an error.

WIZARD.TITLE: AI Assistant Builder
WIZARD.SUBTITLE: Let's create your ideal AI assistant
WIZARD.DESCRIPTION: Describe your business and how you'd like the assistant to work. I'll generate all the configuration for you.
WIZARD.REVIEW_DESCRIPTION: Here's what I've generated. You can review and adjust after creation.
WIZARD.GUIDED_DESCRIPTION: I'll interview you about your business and generate a complete agent configuration with all 7 sections.
WIZARD.CONNECTION_ERROR: Could not connect to the AI service. Check that LiteLLM and Sidekiq are running.

PREVIEW.TITLE: Test Agent
PREVIEW.EMPTY: Send a message to test your agent's responses.
PREVIEW.ERROR: An error occurred while generating a response.

TEMPLATES.TITLE: Start with a template
TEMPLATES.DESCRIPTION: Choose a pre-built workflow to get started, or drag nodes from the palette to build your own.
TEMPLATES.OR_DRAG: Or drag nodes from the left palette to build from scratch.

RUNS.TITLE: Workflow Runs
RUNS.EMPTY: No workflow runs yet. Runs will appear here once conversations trigger this agent's workflow.
RUNS.SELECT_RUN: Select a run from the list to view its details.

KNOWLEDGE.TITLE: Knowledge Bases
KNOWLEDGE.DESCRIPTION: Add knowledge bases to give your agent context for answering questions.
KNOWLEDGE.EMPTY: No knowledge bases yet. Add documents to give your agent context.

DELETE.CONFIRM: Delete this knowledge base and all its documents?

DESCRIPTION.LABEL: Description
DESCRIPTION.PLACEHOLDER: Describe the contents of this knowledge base

DOCUMENTS.TITLE: Documents
DOCUMENTS.CONTENT_PLACEHOLDER: Enter URL or paste text content...

CREATE.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Document added and queued for processing

TOOLS.TITLE: Tools
TOOLS.DESCRIPTION: Configure HTTP tools and built-in actions for your agent.
TOOLS.EMPTY: No tools configured. Add HTTP tools or built-in actions for your agent.

DESCRIPTION.LABEL: Description
DESCRIPTION.PLACEHOLDER: Looks up an order by ID

VOICE.TITLE: Voice Settings
VOICE.DESCRIPTION: Configure voice agents for phone conversations (requires Voice or Hybrid agent type)
VOICE.NOT_VOICE_AGENT: Voice settings are only available for Voice and Hybrid agent types.

GREETING.LABEL: Greeting Message
GREETING.PLACEHOLDER: Hello! How can I help you today?

DEPLOY.TITLE: Deploy
DEPLOY.DESCRIPTION: Connect this agent to inboxes to start handling conversations automatically.
DEPLOY.EMPTY: No inboxes connected. Connect an inbox to deploy this agent.
